languages.text: {n}Губы офицера изгибаются в странной пародии на улыбку.{/n} "Я будто уже слышал вас, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Лорд-капитан{/d}. Перед тем, как боль пришла. Тогда было еще хуже, но потом явились вы, и стало легче. Я не помню, почему. Я помню только то, что вы пришли". {n}Он странно дергается, мучительно медленно направляя оружие вниз.{/n}

{n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Губы офицера изгибаются в странной пародии на улыбку.{/n} "Я будто уже слышал вас, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Лорд-капитан{/d}. Перед тем, как боль пришла. Тогда было еще хуже, но потом явились вы, и стало легче. Я не помню, почему. Я помню только то, что вы пришли". {n}Он странно дергается, мучительно медленно направляя оружие вниз.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}

{n}The officer's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I feel as though I have heard you before, Lord Captain. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but then you appeared, and I felt better. I do not remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, agonizingly slowly lowering his weapon.{/n}

{n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, Lord Captain. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}

{n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, Lord Captain. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Sergeant verzieht seine Lippen zu einer seltsamen Parodie eines Lächelns.{/n} "Ich denke, das habe ich von Euch schon einmal gehört, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Bevor der Schmerz einsetzte. Damals war er sogar noch schlimmer, aber als Ihr kamt, fühlte ich mich besser. Ich weiß nicht mehr warum. Ich weiß nur noch, dass Ihr kamt." {n}Er zuckt und lässt mit quälender Langsamkeit seine Waffe sinken.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Sergeant verzieht seine Lippen zu einer seltsamen Parodie eines Lächelns.{/n} "Ich denke, das habe ich von Euch schon einmal gehört, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Bevor der Schmerz einsetzte. Damals war er sogar noch schlimmer, aber als Ihr kamt, fühlte ich mich besser. Ich weiß nicht mehr warum. Ich weiß nur noch, dass Ihr kamt." {n}Er zuckt und lässt mit quälender Langsamkeit seine Waffe sinken.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les lèvres du sergent se tordent en un étrange sourire.{/n} « Je vous ai déjà {mf|entendu|entendue} dire ça, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}{mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}{/d}. Avant que la douleur ne s'installe. C'était encore pire, à ce moment-là, mais vous voir a suffi à atténuer mes souffrances. Je ne sais plus pourquoi. Tout ce dont je me souviens, c'est que vous êtes {mf|venu|venue}. » {n}Il tressaille, baissant son arme avec une lenteur insoutenable.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les lèvres du sergent se tordent en un étrange sourire.{/n} « Je vous ai déjà {mf|entendu|entendue} dire ça, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}{mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}{/d}. Avant que la douleur ne s'installe. C'était encore pire, à ce moment-là, mais vous voir a suffi à atténuer mes souffrances. Je ne sais plus pourquoi. Tout ce dont je me souviens, c'est que vous êtes {mf|venu|venue}. » {n}Il tressaille, baissant son arme avec une lenteur insoutenable.{/n}

languages.text: {n}军士的嘴唇拧出一个怪异的、像是微笑的表情。{/n}“我记得以前也听您这么说过，{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}舰长大人{/d}，在这剧痛开始之前。那时的情况比现在更糟，但您一出现，我就觉得好多了。我不记得因为什么，只记得您来了。”{n}他浑身一颤，手里的武器以一种折磨人的缓慢速度垂落下去。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}军士的嘴唇拧出一个怪异的、像是微笑的表情。{/n}“我记得以前也听您这么说过，{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}舰长大人{/d}，在这剧痛开始之前。那时的情况比现在更糟，但您一出现，我就觉得好多了。我不记得因为什么，只记得您来了。”{n}他浑身一颤，手里的武器以一种折磨人的缓慢速度垂落下去。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La boca del sargento se retuerce, formando una especie de sonrisa.{/n} «Creo que eso ya me lo dijo antes, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Capitán{/d}. Antes del dolor. Era peor aún entonces, pero, cuando apareció, me sentí mejor. No recuerdo por qué, pero sí recuerdo que vino». {n}Convulsiona y baja el arma con una lentitud tortuosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La boca del sargento se retuerce, formando una especie de sonrisa.{/n} «Creo que eso ya me lo dijo antes, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Capitán{/d}. Antes del dolor. Era peor aún entonces, pero, cuando apareció, me sentí mejor. No recuerdo por qué, pero sí recuerdo que vino». {n}Convulsiona y baja el arma con una lentitud tortuosa.{/n}

languages.text: {n}軍曹の唇が、奇妙な笑みのまがいものへとゆがむ。{/n}「以前にもあなたが同じことを言うのを聞いた気がします、{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}ロード・キャプテン{/d}。痛みが始まる前に。あのときはもっとひどかったのですが、あなたが現れると、楽になった。なぜかは思い出せません。ただ、あなたが来てくれたことだけは覚えています。」{n}彼は痙攣し、苦しげにゆっくりと武器を下ろす。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}軍曹の唇が、奇妙な笑みのまがいものへとゆがむ。{/n}「以前にもあなたが同じことを言うのを聞いた気がします、{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}ロード・キャプテン{/d}。痛みが始まる前に。あのときはもっとひどかったのですが、あなたが現れると、楽になった。なぜかは思い出せません。ただ、あなたが来てくれたことだけは覚えています。」{n}彼は痙攣し、苦しげにゆっくりと武器を下ろす。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Çavuşun dudakları, gülümsemenin tuhaf bir taklidiyle kıvrılıyor.{/n} "Sanırım bunu daha önce söylediğinizi duymuştum {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Kaptan{/d}. Acı başlamadan önce. O zamanlar daha da kötüydü ama siz gelince kendimi daha iyi hissetmiştim. Nedenini hatırlamıyorum. Sadece geldiğinizi hatırlıyorum." {n}Seğiriyor, silahı ızdırap verecek kadar yavaşça iniyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant's lips twist into a strange parody of a smile.{/n} "I think I heard you say that before, {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_Glory}Lord Captain{/d}. Before the pain set in. It was even worse back then, but when you appeared, I felt better. I don't remember why. I only remember that you came." {n}He twitches, his weapon lowering agonisingly slowly.{/n}
